snippet.title: Macha y el Bloque Depresivo - Continentales desde el Estadio Nacional ( En vivo )
snippet.description:
Extraído desde el concierto realizado en el Estadio Nacional de Santiago, Chile, la noche del sábado 20 de diciembre, 2025.

Banda:

Macha (Aldo Asenjo) en voz y guitarra
Joselo (José Osses) en voz, piano y guitarra
Raúl (Raúl Céspedes) en guitarra acústica
Machi (Mauricio Barrueto) en guitarra acústica
Carlitos (Carlos Rodríguez) en trompeta
Tocori (Simón Berrú) en voz, bajo y guitarrón nicaragüense
Pezoa (Daniel Pezoa) en percusión
Pegafix (Christian Duarte) en percusión
Camilo (Camilo Salinas ) en piano.

Músicos invitados:
Cuarteto Austral


Equipo técnico Macha y El Bloque Depresivo: 
Claudius Rieth, Rodrigo Mardones, Ignacio Jaduri, Cristian Zamora,  Jhonny Reyes, Carlos Mol, Emiliano Asenjo, Jorge Espinoza, Enrique Fierro y Raúl Contreras

Grabación Audio
Claudius Rieth y Diego Ili

Mezcla y Master de Audio
Claudius Rieth

Equipo Audiovisual Liberfilm
Dirección: Kevin Rodríguez 
Producción: Javier Castro
Asistentes de producción: Lorenzo Lobos - Diego Felipe

Producción General
Carlos Salazar Isla

(Not afraid, not afraid of losing everything I have)
 
Am I wrong or right?
You’ll know it in time
(I don’t need help, I don’t need help ’cause I can handle anything)
 
Rise till we end this fight
We’re leaving no room for regret
Cut the fake, just stick to the truth
 
I keep my head up high
Through all this pain
I’m letting it out
 
I’m aiming high to feel alive
Nothing’s gonna drag me down
Every scar is proof I tried
You’ll never see me caught off guard
 
They say “give it up”
Tell ’em “not enough”
Count my losses the whole night
Yeah, you know I don’t care how many times I fall
’Cause I’ll come back to life
 
In the sunlight, in the moonlight
I was out of sight, did you know?
Seems like they really want me to be alone

Every story, different endings
Let’s see it with our own eyes
Walking straight into the future
I won’t look back at the past
 
Oh hide this fear deep inside
Who I used to be, I’ll forget
Take a breath, become someone new
 
I keep my head up high
Through all this pain
I’m letting it out
 
I’m aiming high to feel alive
Nothing’s gonna drag me down
Every scar is proof I tried
You’ll never see me caught off guard
 
They say “give it up”
Tell ’em “not enough”
Count my losses the whole night
Yeah, you know I don’t care how many times I fall
’Cause I’ll come back to life
 
My mind’s lucid, done being foolish
Finally, I’m now breaking free
Racing to the place that makes us who we are yeah
 
Hey
They say “give it up”
Tell ’em “not enough”
Count my losses the whole night
Yeah, you know I don’t care how many times I fall
’Cause I’ll come back to life
 
They say “give it up”
Tell ’em “not enough”
Count my losses the whole night

Yeah, you know I don’t care how many times I fall
Come let’s go back to life

snippet.title: Resident Evil Requiem - Leon Must Die Forever Free Update Trailer
snippet.description:
Leon Must Die Forever is available now as a free update to Resident Evil Requiem!

Unlocked by completing the story, this additional minigame mode challenges you to clear numerous stages as Leon while unlocking exclusive enhancer abilities. The fast-paced action is distinct from the main story mode, and is packed with replay value. Can you make it to the end alive and defeat the boss within the time limit?

Multiple difficulty levels are available, including an extreme high-difficulty mode for only the most confident players. True to the title, you’ll "die forever"...

Resident Evil Requiem is out now on PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, Steam, Epic Games Store and GeForce NOW.

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

Reparto: Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson, Lupita Nyong’o, Zendaya, Charlize Theron
Escrita y Dirigida por: Christopher Nolan 
Producida por: Emma Thomas, Christopher Nolan 
Productor Ejecutivo: Thomas Hayslip

Christopher Nolan presenta su próxima película, La Odisea, una épica de acción mitológica filmada alrededor del mundo utilizando una nueva tecnología de película IMAX®. La cinta lleva la saga fundacional de Homero a las salas de IMAX® por primera vez y llegará a los cines de todo el mundo el 16 de julio de 2026.

La Odisea está protagonizada por Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson y Lupita Nyong’o, con Zendaya y Charlize Theron.

La Odisea es producida por Emma Thomas y Christopher Nolan para su compañía, Syncopy. El productor ejecutivo es Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: Sin Bandera - Que lloro (Letra)
snippet.description:
Sin Bandera - Que lloro (Letra/Lyrics)

Lyrics:
Quédate un momento así
No mires hacia mí
Que no podría aguantar
Si clavas tu mirada
Que me hiela el cuerpo
Me ha pasado antes
Que no puedo hablar
Tal vez pienses que estoy loco, y es verdad: un poco
Tengo que aceptar, pero si no te explico
Lo que siento dentro
No vas a entender cuando me veas llorar
Nunca me sentí tan solo
Como cuando ayer
De pronto lo entendí mientras callaba
La vida me dijo a gritos
Que nunca te tuve y nunca te perdí
Y me explicaba
Que el amor es una cosa
Que se da de pronto en forma natural, lleno de fuego
Si lo forzás se marchita
Sin tener principio, llega a su final
Ahora, tal vez, lo puedas entender
Que si me tocas se quema mi piel
Ahora, tal vez, lo puedas entender
Y no te vuelvas si no quieres ver
Que lloro por ti
Que lloro sin ti

Que no eres para mí

snippet.title: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 - Official Adeptus Mechanicus Faction Trailer
snippet.description:
Witness the unwavering devotion of the Adeptus Mechanicus. Check out the latest Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 trailer for this upcoming real-time strategy game to get a deep dive into the Adeptus Mechanicus faction. Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 will be available on Steam in 2026.

Replacing flesh with machine, and seeking forbidden knowledge, The Adeptus Mechanicus are not merely engineers or scientists… but a procession dedicated to war. Every calculation, every cybernetic action, all in service to, and guided by The Machine God. 

From the disciplined ranks of the Skitarii Rangers cutting down enemies from the firing lines, to the towering might of the Knight Castelan capable of annihiliating all who oppose the will of the Omnissiah, the Adeptus Mechanicus bring their relentless efficiency to the battlefield. 

Supported by some of the most advanced structures among the factions, the Adeptus Mechanicus establish a growing stronghold across Kronos, with their ever-expanding Noosphere Network which continues to increase data, output, and optimization further increasing their relentless power.

The Machine is All. All is the Machine.

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

No quiero amorío, lo mío es vivir y pasarla bonito
Tengo el cora frío pero el invierno es mi clima favorito
No quiero volver a sufrir, así que del amor ya me quito (ya me quito)
 
Que no te falle la memoria que un día me hiciste llorar
Y en vez de consolarme lo que hiciste fue ignorar
Y ahora que ya no quiero nada, tú estás haciendo de más
Mi amor no se esfuerce tanto, que a veces menos es más
Y aunque me sigue doliendo me está haciendo menos mal
Menos mal abrí los ojos en el momento ideal
Cuando ya no te necesito, ya no se mirar pa’ atrás
Y este amor que te tenía
Hoy por fin descansa en paz
 
Ya pa’ que
Ya cuando por ti no siento na’
Ya no siento na’
No, no siento na’
Te saque, ya mi amor
Por ti no siento na’
No, no siento na’ bebé

ah
